---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for nodes or datasets
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**
A short description of the problem (e.g. "I need a node that...").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen (e.g. new node, new script option, dataset format).

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Use case, examples, or references if any.
